commands.speaker: Narrator
commands.text: Classes have begun at Sakura Academy. The days are filled with learning and new experiences.

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: Hey {player_name}! There's a memory challenge game in the activity room. Want to try it?

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: A memory challenge? That sounds fun! Let's see who has the better memory!

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: I've been practicing! I bet I can remember more sequences than you!

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: Get ready, {target_name}! I'm going to crush this memory challenge!

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: We'll see about that! May the best memory win!

commands.speaker: Niem
commands.text: That was amazing! Your memory is really sharp!

commands.speaker: {player_name}
commands.text: Thanks! You were pretty impressive too. We should do this more often!

commands.speaker: Narrator
commands.text: The friendly competition brought {player_name} and {target_name} closer together.
